name: Grilled Pork Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Pork tenderloin, fat and sinew removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill.
2. Cut pork tenderloin crosswise into 1-inch medallions. Place cut side down and flatten to 1/2-inch thick with the broad side of a chef's knife or rolling pin.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the wine, olive oil, lemon juice, honey, tarragon, and pepper. Coat pork medallions in marinade. Turn and marinate at room temperature for 15 minutes, or up to two hours in the refrigerator.
4. When coals are ready, place medallions, cut side down, on the grill. Cook over medium heat about three minutes, or until juices rise to the surface. Turn and grill on the other side three or four minutes, or until no longer pink. Serve immediately.
